ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Amended Proposed Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Intention To Move And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Order And Enter Another And Different Order.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Ann Scully, Bryan Bordon and Charles Scully II. John Leutza for Anne Scully and Nancy Danish.

Mr. Leutza stated that he filed the amended proposed distribution and that the petition for preliminary distribution of $90,000.00 to each of the 7 beneficiaries was to be heard on May 7, 2008. With regard to the Motion To Set Aside And Vacate The Order, Mr. Barringer argued that the residue was to go to 2 parties, that one of the parties had 3 children, that the other party had 4 children, that each share was to be looked at differenrtly and stated that his client was not happy with the order. The Court denied the Motion To Set Aside/Vacate Order. The matter was continued to August 5, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rafael Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Amended Proposed Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for Anne Sacully and Nancy Danish (Administrators).

Mr. Leutza raised the issue of transferee and presented a copy of the Points and Authority to the Court. In addition, Mr. Leutza stated that all the beneficiaries waived notice. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Joann Prior CSR 129. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
